notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena plunked
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena hit by pitch. Josh Naylor to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cole Young plunked
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young hit by pitch. Josh Naylor scores. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Dominic Canzone to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley hits a grand slam (7) to right center field. Josh Naylor scores. Randy Arozarena scores. J.P. Crawford scores.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds out, third baseman Miguel Vargas to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena steals (9) 2nd base. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Randy Arozarena advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Drew Romo.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder flies out to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Eduard Bazardo picks off Sam Antonacci at 1st on throw to first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
